Brand.name: Kinorà
Brand.tagline: Exercises and tools for those getting back on track

Home.subtitle: Session {current} of {total} · Week {week}
Home.continueLabel: Pick up where you left off

Common.comingSoonBody: We're still building this applicative. Check back soon.

Walking.title: Walking
Walking.intro: Drag the frames into the correct order of the gait cycle.
Walking.hint: Picture someone walking, seen from the side.
Walking.errorBody: Focus on the movement of the legs and arms. Try again.
Walking.introBody: Drag the frames to rebuild the gait cycle. You'll level up after every success.
Walking.errorNothing: Try again! Think about the gait cycle

NeglectGo.title: Find the numbers around you
NeglectGo.intro: You're inside a 360° panorama. Ten numbers are hidden all around: right, left, up, down. Drag with your finger to find them all.
NeglectGo.step1: Drag across the screen to look around.
NeglectGo.step2: Bring a number into the centre reticle.
NeglectGo.step3: Hold still: after a moment the number is captured.
NeglectGo.calibratingHint: Look forward for a moment while we calibrate.
NeglectGo.errorCamera: Can't access the camera. Check your browser permissions and try again.
NeglectGo.errorMotion: Motion sensors are needed to play. On iPhone: Settings → Safari → Advanced → Website Data → find this site → tap Remove. Then come back, reload the page, tap Start, and choose "Allow" when prompted.
NeglectGo.errorNoSensor: This device can't detect motion. Open Neglect Go from a smartphone.
NeglectGo.wonBody: You scanned the space around you. Continue for another round.
NeglectGo.landscapeBody: Neglect Go only works in portrait mode.
